mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO attendance( lecture_id, course_id, member_id, attend_date, `status` ) SELECT c.lecture_id, c.course_id, c.member_id, #{attendDate}, 'attend' FROM course c WHERE c.lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM attendance a WHERE a.lecture_id = c.lecture_id AND a.course_id = c.course_id AND a.attend_date = #{attendDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.attend_id AS attendId, a.attend_date AS attendDate, m.`code` AS `code`, m.`name` AS `name`, s.academic_year AS academicYear, mj.`name` AS `major`, a.`status` AS `status`, a.reason AS reason, a.lecture_id FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON mj.major_id = s.major_id WHERE a.lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND a.attend_date = #{attendDate} AND m.role = 'student' ORDER BY m.`name` ASC

SELECT m.code AS code, m.name AS name, s.academic_year AS academicYear, mj.name AS major, 'attend' AS status, null AS reason, null AS attendId, #{attendDate} AS attendDate FROM course c LEFT JOIN student s ON c.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON s.major_id = mj.major_id WHERE c.lecture_id = #{lectureId} AND m.role = 'student' AND m.member_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.name ASC
